bottleneck.next_action: Run one source-identifiable outreach or launch experiment and ask qualified teams to submit the price-disclosed pilot form.
bottleneck.reason: No pilot request has entered the attributed funnel.

measurement_note: Artifact request deltas can include CI, maintainer checks, and retries. They are not unique-user or conversion-rate denominators and cannot be assigned to self-reported lead sources or purchase criteria. Purchase criteria are self-reported evaluation priorities, not causal attribution, willingness to pay, or proof of a moat. Only paid pilot stages count as revenue.
